name: Lumpies
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 350 degrees F (175 degrees C).
2. Grease cookie sheets and set aside.
3. Melt chocolate over low heat in a double boiler or small saucepan, or melt in the microwave.
4. In a large mixing bowl, cream butter and sugar until light and fluffy.
5. Add egg, milk, and vanilla extract to the mixture; beat until well combined.
6. Sift flour with baking soda into a separate bowl.
7. Gradually add dry ingredients to the creamed butter mixture, beating well after each addition.
8. Stir in melted chocolate and chopped nuts; the batter will be thick.
9. Drop spoonfuls of batter onto prepared cookie sheets. The cookies will spread slightly during baking.
10. Bake for 12-15 minutes, or until set.
11. For frosting: In a small bowl, combine butter, powdered sugar, and cocoa until smooth.
12. Gradually add hot coffee to the frosting mixture, stirring continuously until desired consistency is reached.
13. Frost the cooled cookies generously.
